name: HRE_TOUCHPT_EMPL_EVTS_INTRCNS
description: Employee interactions as defined in touchpoints like check-in, request feedback, anytime feedback, celebrations et all are stored in this table.

columns.Name: REFERENCE_ID
columns.Comments: Primary key, The copied primary key id of the engagement like checkin, request feedback et all.

columns.Name: TEMPLATE_ID
columns.Comments: The template id of interactions.

columns.Name: REVIEW_PERIOD_ID
columns.Comments: The review period of interactions.

columns.Name: STATUS_CODE
columns.Comments: The status code of interactions like NEW or COMPLETED.

columns.Name: ENGAGEMENT_TYPE
columns.Comments: The event or interaction type like ORA_HRE_CHECK-IN, ORA_HRE_FEEDBACK, et all.

columns.Name: ENGAGEMENT_DATE
columns.Comments: The date of engagement for example check-in date.

columns.Name: CREATED_FOR_PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: The person_id for whom this engagement is created.

columns.Name: CREATED_FOR_ASSIGNMENT_ID
columns.Comments: The assignment_id for whom this engagement is created.

columns.Name: CREATED_FOR_MANAGER_PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: The manger_person_id of the person_id for whom this engagement is created.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY_PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: The person_id who generated this engagement.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY_ASSIGNMENT_ID
columns.Comments: The assignment_id who generated this engagement.

columns.Name: HIDDEN_FLAG
columns.Comments: Store data of type character . For example, 'Y' or 'N' for hidden flag from notes.

columns.Name: VISIBILITY
columns.Comments: The visbility level of this engagement.

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to PER_BUSINESS_GROUPS

columns.Name: REQUEST_ID
columns.Comments: Enterprise Service Scheduler: indicates the request ID of the job that created or last updated the row.

columns.Name: CHECKIN_TOPICS_DISCUSSED_COUNT
columns.Comments: Store data of type number for the engagement type. For example, CHECKIN_TOPICS_DISCUSSED_COUNT for check-in engagements.

columns.Name: CHECKIN_TOPICS_TOTAL_COUNT
columns.Comments: Store data of type number for the engagement type. For example, CHECKIN_TOPICS_TOTAL_COUNT for check-in engagements.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
